ROOM 501; JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; REPORTER: ERIC THRONE; CLERK: GARTH SAYERS; STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT RECITED ON THE RECORD. RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1206 VALENCIA #6 TO PLAINTIFF. NO STAY OF EXECUTION. WRIT OF POSSESSION WILL ISSUE. DEFT. AGREES TO VACATE BY 10/7/01. AGREE SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE APPLIED TO ALL OUTSTANDING DAMAGES. EACH PARTY WILL BE PAY OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. TRIAL OFF CALENDAR.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, SAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1206 VALENCIA STREET, #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
